name: Research & Write Pipeline
description: Research a topic, outline, draft, review, and finalize.

steps.prompt: Research {{topic}} thoroughly for an audience of {{audience}}. Gather key facts, examples, and references.
Create a detailed outline for a document about {{topic}} based on the research.
Write a complete draft based on the outline. Target audience: {{audience}}.

steps.message: Review the draft before finalizing. Approve to continue or reject to stop.

steps.prompt: Polish and finalize the document. Fix any issues noted during review.
